note: MFA Oil full store list parsed from sitemap + individual pages. Includes Petro-Card 24 fueling stations, MFA Oil bulk/propane plants, and mixed locations. ~56 of these explicitly mention propane service (delivery, tank, bulk). Non-propane Break Time gas stations (75 URLs) and Big O Tires (1 URL) and corporate office excluded from the fetch list. Phones parsed from tel: hrefs, skipping 800-366-0200 corporate hotline.
